name: Claude Code Rules
description: Installs a curated, condensed set of Claude Code behavior rules into ~/.claude/rules/

enforceSafety.description: Enforce safety invariants: human sovereignty, no-attribution, no-secrets

standardizeWorkflow.description: Standardize agent workflow: skill discovery, MCP tools first, anti-overengineering, conventional commits, no-orphans, branch strategy

protectGit.description: Protect git configuration: never override git config inline

preferPythonTooling.description: Prefer Python toolchain rules: uv/uvx for Python, mdformat with frontmatter/gfm plugins
